code: import axios from"axios";const BACKEND_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL||"";export const API="".concat(BACKEND_URL,"/api");export const api=axios.create({baseURL:API,headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json"}});export async function fetchLaunchInfo(){const{data}=await api.get("/launch-info");return data;}export async function fetchStats(){const{data}=await api.get("/waitlist/stats");return data;}export async function joinWaitlist(payload){const{data}=await api.post("/waitlist",payload);return data;}
